tests.name: routing/results/merge builds an empty analysis result for a file path
routing/results/merge prefers later items when merging lists by id
routing/results/merge keeps base items when no later items are provided
routing/results/merge treats missing item arrays as empty lists
routing/results/merge deduplicates relations by the routed relation key
routing/results/merge keeps base relations when no later relations are provided
routing/results/merge treats missing relation arrays as empty lists
routing/results/merge merges analysis results field by field
routing/results/merge keeps the base file path when the next result omits it
graphView/mergedGroups keeps user groups ahead of built-in and plugin defaults
graphView/mergedGroups does not infer a disabled empty section key from leading-colon ids
graphView/mergedGroups includes built-in and plugin defaults when no user groups exist
graphView/mergedGroups applies persisted visibility overrides to built-in and plugin defaults
graphView/mergedGroups keeps unordered groups stable while moving ordered groups ahead of them
graphView/mergedGroups preserves relative order when legend order does not mention either group
